summary: Completed full e2e testing of Project Management Tool timeline features. All requested features are working correctly: login, project creation, timeline auto-calculation, duration inputs, and E marker (extra day) functionality.

issues: ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies in PMDashboardNew.jsx and other pages (not critical, just warnings)

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings for missing useEffect dependencies in several pages (PMDashboardNew, AMDashboard, LPDashboard, ProjectDetail, TeamDashboard) - consider adding eslint-disable comment or fixing the dependencies

login_functionality.details: Login with pm@agency.com / demo123 works correctly, redirects to dashboard

navigation_to_project_management.details: Sidebar navigation to Project Management page works correctly

project_timeline_rendering.details: ProjectTimeline component renders with project data, shows all stages with columns: Task, Type, Dept, Days, +Extra, Start, End, and date columns

duration_input_fields.details: Duration inputs work correctly - entering a value updates the stage and triggers auto-calculation

auto_calculation_of_stage_dates.details: When durations are set, start/end dates cascade correctly. Next stage starts day after previous stage ends. Verified: Stage 1 (3 days) 02-09 to 02-11, Stage 2 (2 days) 02-12 to 02-13, subsequent stages start 02-14

e_marker_toggle.details: Clicking on timeline cells toggles E marker correctly, shows red E in cell, updates +Extra counter

extra_days_push_dates.details: Adding E marker pushes all subsequent stage dates forward by 1 day. Verified: After adding E marker to stage 1, +Extra became 1, end date extended by 1 day, and all subsequent stages shifted forward

create_new_project.details: Create project dialog works, project is created with default workflow stages, appears in project list

toast_notifications.details: Toast notifications appear for project updates and creation

seed_data_creation: None needed - existing project 'Urban Jungle (Feb 2026)' was used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All timeline auto-calculation features are working. Backend APIs (11 tests) all pass. Frontend Playwright tests for login, navigation, duration inputs, date auto-calculation, and E marker toggling all pass. The build was previously fixed by disabling babel visual-edits plugin.
